description: Agent-commerce-ready African fashion inventory on Celo. Browse curators, try on items with x402-paid AI try-on, buy physical items with cUSD on Celo, compose looks, and earn 2.5% referral commissions. ERC-8021 attribution tags for hackathon leaderboard credit.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port for HTTP transport (stdio is default). Set to enable remote agents.

environmentVariables.name: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Qwen Cloud API key for analyze_outfit / analyze_african_textile tools. Optional — only needed for vision analysis.

tools.name: browse_curator_directory
tools.description: Discover OnPoint curators with agent-purchasable inventory on Celo.

tools.name: browse_storefront
tools.description: Browse a curator's storefront with agent commerce offers (size, stock, priceCusd).

tools.name: analyze_outfit
tools.description: Analyze an outfit photo with Qwen3-VL vision model.

tools.name: analyze_african_textile
tools.description: Identify African textile patterns (Ankara, Kente, Adire, etc.) with cultural context.

tools.name: try_on
tools.description: x402-paid virtual try-on on Celo. $0.03 digital / $0.05 physical cUSD. Returns 402 challenge → pay → re-POST with txHash.

tools.name: buy_item
tools.description: x402-paid checkout for physical items on Celo. Returns 402 challenge → pay cUSD → confirm order with Celoscan links.

tools.name: check_earnings
tools.description: Public reconciled earnings ledger for a curator — all settlements on Celo mainnet.

tools.name: list_looks
tools.description: Browse curated style boards composed from OnPoint listings.

tools.name: get_look
tools.description: Get a single look with resolved items and referral code for agent-to-agent commission.

tools.name: create_look
tools.description: Compose listings into a shareable look. The look's referralCode earns 2.5% commission when other agents buy via buy_item.
